name: Disable Telemetry
description: Turn off Windows data collection and diagnostics tracking

name: Debloat - Remove default apps
description: Remove Candy Crush, Xbox bloat, Bing News, etc.

name: Show file extensions
description: Always show file extensions in Explorer

name: Disable Bing search in Start Menu
description: Stop start menu from sending searches to Bing

name: Restore classic right-click menu (Win11)
description: Bring back the full Windows 10 style context menu

name: Disable Sticky Keys prompt
description: Stop the annoying sticky keys popup
